narrative:
New Richmond Village A (precinct in Clermont County) has 751 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.7 percentage points.
